page: Vultr vbm-128c-2048gb-amd is a bare metal server belonging to the Bare Metal SSD family. It features AMD EPYC 7713 processors built on the x86_64 architecture, delivering 128 physical cores and 256 vCPUs with a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory, providing an allocation of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For local storage, the server includes a 960 GB solid-state drive. It does not feature any dedicated graphics processing units. The network configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

With 2048.0 GB of RAM and 256 vCPUs, this server offers a high-density memory-to-core ratio. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale virtualization, database hosting, and enterprise-grade data processing tasks that require massive memory footprints alongside high parallel computing capacity.
description: Vultr vbm-128c-2048gb-amd is a bare metal server in the Bare Metal SSD family, powered by AMD EPYC 7713 processors. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, it provides 128 physical cores and 256 vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz. The server is configured with 2048.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes a 960 GB local SSD. It does not contain any graphics processing units. This high-density memory configuration is designed for large-scale enterprise workloads, extensive database hosting, virtualization, and memory-intensive data processing. The server also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.
